title: Neostenanthera neurosericea
intro: Neostenanthera neurosericea, also known as the African Neostenanthera, is a plant species belonging to the family Annonaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in African folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Neostenanthera neurosericea include alkaloids, terpenoids, and flavonoids, which have been identified as responsible for its medicinal activities. The most common herbal preparations made with Neostenanthera neurosericea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory and digestive problems.
